name: Harnesson
summary: Visual AI Coding Management Platform — 基于 AI Agent 的可视化编码管理平台，提供 AI 对话、项目管理、规格图谱和应用导航功能。
goals: Provide visual management for AI coding agents
Visualize codebase specs as knowledge graphs

acceptanceCriteria.given: 用户打开 Harnesson 应用
acceptanceCriteria.then: 显示新建会话、项目、图谱、任务、文件、Git 导航项

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): restructure spec tree with flatter node hierarchy
